chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1457 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on CMA 7446/2018 3.For hearing of main case 21-12-2023 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G. ***** Petitioners have filed this petition seeking directions to respondents to remove encroachment from government land bearing survey No.368 of Deh Chodahu Taluka Kotdiji district Khairpur which has been encroached upon by other villagers. Learned AAG has submitted a copy of judgment dated 23.02.2022 passed by this Court in C.P.No.D-626 of 2021 and has stated that the petitioners have an adequate and efficacious remedy before the Anti-Encroachment Tribunal. Learned counsel for petitioners submits that the Anti- Encroachment Tribunal is not entertaining the complaint. Hence, they have filed this petition. However, in the light of judgment dated 23.02.2022 passed in C.P.No.D-626 of 2021, the petition in hand is disposed of along with listed application being not maintainable. However, petitioners are at liberty to approach Ant-Encroachment Tribunal with a complaint, which the Tribunal shall entertain in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
